title: COMFEE’ Washing Machine 2.4 Cu.ft LED Portable Washing Machine and Washer Lavadora Portátil Compact Laundry, 8 Models, Environmentally Friendly, Child Lock for RV, Dorm, Apartment Ivory White

noise_vibration: After two years of regular use, the washer is now incredibly loud during the spinning cycle. Loud enough that I fear my neighbors will complain, it drowns out all other sounds in the apartment. I spent a couple of hours looking for solutions online and need help finding information on ordering replacement parts or repairing it myself. I cannot find any support for my issues. LOVE this machine... very quiet, efficient, washes a load fast, cleans well... can not say enough about this machine.

Only con is that the control panel is a bit confusing and tiresome, not very straight forward or intuative.

Now the bad part. Testing out the machine the day after i got it (Saturday). On about the 5th test load, the machine started making a loud grating/grind

Bought this product December 2020. It had a smaller tub then I thought, but seemed to work well.

It's now May 6 2021 and the washer no longer works. The inside tub no longer moves. The only thing it does now is fill with water and drain. There's also like an electrical burning smell. I couldn't get ahold of the manufacturer, as it hasn't been quite 6 months yet. I didn't use it ev

The washer worked fabulously...until it didn't. Just under the 90-day mark, it suddenly stopped spin drying the clothes and had a strong burning smell. I contacted the manufacturer thinking they'd repair it, but instead they're issuing a full refund. Now must buy a new one, but not this brand again.
electrical_fault: DO NOT BUY THIS WASHER. We originally were so happy with this purchase for our house. We had the washer for all of two months. One day the washer started to smoke and smelled of burnt rubber and other nasty smells. The washer was only filled with a couple of t shirts, like 6. Washer is great for small spaces. I had it for about 3 months and put a small load in- 2 shirts, two kitchen towels and some socks. Second load was also small- noticed there was still soap residue, so I went to put it on a rinse cycle and it didn’t do anything. Filled it up with water and the washing cycle would not start. Did a “medium” load to see if it was a glitch and it only added more water

At first this washer worked great! Washed clothes and small blankets with ease. Unfortunately after less than a year of use I will have to get rid of it. physical_breakage: Barrel broke within two weeks even with me being very Careful on what I put in and how much I put in

This little machine is very convenient to use and can easily fit into a bathroom or closet. HOWEVER,  AFTER USING IT A FEW WEEKS THE LID BROKE.  WHEN I FINALLY CONTACTED AMAZON THEY SENT ME A MESSAGE ABOUT THE INLET HOSE BUT I DID NOT COMPLAIN ABOUT THE INLET HOSE. THE LID COMPLETELY BROKE OFF THE HINGE. I WAS ABLE TO CONTINUE USING IT BUT HAD TO KEEP PLACING THE LID IN THE GROOVE SO IT WOULD TRIG

Like the size.  I find it difficult to maneuver because it only has an indentation for one hand on one side.  Not easy to move.  Now after only a month, the lid just broke off.  The hinges for the lid, I am now seeing, are very cheap plastic.  For this, I cannot recommend this machine.
